channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: International Criminal Court confirms Duterte's appointment of new legal counsel
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has officially released a document confirming that former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte has appointed a new legal counsel to represent him. This move come...

item.title: US prosecutors request dismissal of fraud charges against Gautam Adani
item.description: U.S. prosecutors have asked a judge to drop criminal fraud and conspiracy charges against Indian billionaire Gautam Adani, who was accused of deceiving investors in a major solar energy project in Ind...

item.title: Jury Rules Against Elon Musk in Lawsuit Over OpenAI Dispute
item.description: Elon Musk's legal battle against Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, OpenAI, and Microsoft has concluded with a unanimous verdict against him. Musk had accused the OpenAI co-founders and Microsoft of misapprop...

item.title: President Samia Suluhu Hassan Establishes Special Commission to Probe 2025 Election Violence
item.description: Dar es Salaam. President Samia Suluhu Hassan has formed a new special criminal inquiry commission to thoroughly investigate all violent incidents that happened during and after the October 29, 2025 ge...

item.title: How 20th-Century Innovations Shaped Kannauj’s Attar Industry
item.description: Kannauj, often celebrated as the perfume capital of India, owes its renown not merely to ancient traditions but to a series of inventive adaptations in the last 150 years. While media frequently empha...

item.title: Investigation Reveals Accused in Vikarabad Double Murder Intended to Target Several Lenders Due to Debts
item.description: The recent investigation into the tragic murder of two women moneylenders in Vikarabad district has revealed a disturbing plot involving the accused couple, Kareema and her husband Rahman, along with ...

item.title: Treasurer Jim Chalmers stands by housing tax changes despite negative budget polls
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has defended the federal Labor government's latest budget, despite polls indicating it is one of the least popular in decades. A Newspoll commissioned by The Australian found th...

item.title: Anthropic to Update Global Financial Authorities on Cybersecurity Risks Found by Mythos AI
item.description: Anthropic, an AI company known for its Claude chatbot, is set to brief the Financial Stability Board (FSB) on cybersecurity vulnerabilities detected by its latest AI model, Mythos. This briefing comes...

item.title: Kenya Faces Violence and Disruption Amid Fuel Price Hike and Nationwide Transport Strike
item.description: Kenya imekumbwa na vurugu na usumbufu mkubwa baada ya ongezeko la bei ya mafuta. Siku ya Jumatatu, watu wanne waliripotiwa kufariki dunia wakati maandamano yalipoongezeka katika miji mingi, huku safar...

item.title: Andy Burnham faces Brexit-related challenge ahead of Westminster return
item.description: Andy Burnham, the former Mayor of Greater Manchester, is encountering a significant political challenge as he seeks to return to Westminster. Comments he previously made regarding the possibility of r...

item.title: Channel 4 withdraws MAFS UK from streaming amid contributor welfare review
item.description: Channel 4 has removed all past seasons of 'Married at First Sight UK' from its streaming services following serious allegations of misconduct involving a small number of former participants. The broad...

item.title: US Jury Rules Against Elon Musk in OpenAI Lawsuit Over Founding Dispute
item.description: On 18th May 2026, a US jury in Oakland, California gave a unanimous verdict against Elon Musk in his lawsuit against OpenAI, saying the company is not liable for allegedly deviating from its original ...

item.title: Trump-Backed Navy SEAL Candidate Ed Gallrein Accused of Inflating Bronze Star Count in Challenge to Rep. Thomas Massie
item.description: Ed Gallrein, a retired Navy SEAL and Republican congressional candidate endorsed by President Donald Trump to unseat Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky's 4th District, has responded angrily to a Daily Cal...

item.title: Authorities warn 20 families in Rodriguez, Rizal about rockslide danger
item.description: Authorities in Rodriguez, Rizal have raised concerns over the safety of 20 families residing in areas prone to rockslides. The local government, in coordination with disaster risk management teams, ha...

item.title: Police search for driver after woman injured in alleged road rage hit-and-run at Alyth Golf Club
item.description: Police in Scotland are appealing for information following a hit-and-run incident in Alyth, Perthshire, where a woman was struck by a van after an apparent road rage confrontation. The event occurred ...

item.title: JD Vance recalls Trump criticizing his shamrock socks during St. Patrick’s Day visit
item.description: During a recent event in Kansas City, U.S. Vice President JD Vance shared a story highlighting former President Donald Trump's strict dress preferences. Vance recounted that last St. Patrick's Day, he...

item.title: DepEd Secures 32,916 Additional Teaching Positions Ahead of School Opening
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has announced that 32,916 new teaching positions have been approved, just in time for the public school opening on June 8. Education Secretary Sonny Angara stated t...

item.title: Arsenal seeks victory over Burnley to maintain control of Premier League title race
item.description: Arsenal will face Burnley in a pivotal Premier League fixture as they aim to keep the title race firmly in their own hands. Currently two points ahead of Manchester City, the Gunners know that a victo...

item.title: Federal budget changes could increase stamp duty costs for small businesses
item.description: The federal budget has introduced tax changes affecting trusts that could force small and medium enterprises (SMEs) to restructure their financial affairs. These restructures may trigger significant s...

item.title: DP Kindiki Explains Measures to Cushion Kenyans from Skyrocketing Fuel Prices
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has come out to clarify the situation following the violent protests in parts of Kenya over rising fuel prices. He blamed the unrest on political leaders exploiting pu...
